flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Isothermal Community College fell 36% between 2006 and 2009 (19.6% → 12.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Isothermal Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Isothermal Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (59.3% → 71.1%).
